name: python3-cpuinfo
title: python3-cpuinfo
summary: Python module for getting CPU info (Python 3)
description:
Python module for getting CPU info (Python 3)
The cpuinfo Python module provides pure Python tools for getting CPU infos.
.
py-cpuinfo works without any extra programs or libraries beyond what the
OS provides. For instance - on Linux based systems - python-cpuinfo retrieves
information from various sources, including but not restricted to:
/proc/cpuinfo, dmesg, lscpu, device-tree ibm features flags, etc.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cpuinfo because Python module for getting CPU info (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cpuinfo as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cpuinfo with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cpuinfo --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
